web_form_fields.description:
Preamble

Khanal Foods employees and suppliers/vendors are governed by a Code of Conduct. We expect all our suppliers/vendors and vendors to strictly abide by this Code of Conduct. Specific provisions that mandate strict adherence have been reproduced below:

  • Khanal Foods will not tolerate bribery in any form, or any kind of corruption. Giving or receiving of bribes is a violation of this Code of Conduct and will call for immediate termination of an agreement or contract.
  • If an employee of Khanal Foods demands any kind of bribe or inducement, the supplier/vendor must report the matter immediately to Khanal Foods at the following mail id: bhupendra@khanalfoods.com
  • Khanal Foods is committed to doing business ethically and will honour all terms and conditions laid out in the agreements/contracts signed with suppliers/vendors.
  • Khanal Foods is committed to paying suppliers/vendors as per the terms of the agreement or contract.
  • Khanal Foods does not charge any amount for introducing products. Khanal Foods team would introduce the products based on the merits of the products and category requirements.
  • Any employee who demands an inducement or a bribe for release of payments or introduction of products or for any kind of favour is violating the Code of Conduct.
  • Khanal Foods does not accept any payments from Vendors in Cash / Vouchers. All payments towards Promotions, Display Fees, Banners etc. should be paid only through Cheque/ Draft/ RTGS transfers in the name of “KHANAL FOODS PRIVATE LIMITED” Any payments done in cash/vouchers or into the personal name of any employee is in violation of Code of Conduct.
  • It is mandatory for a supplier/vendor to report all such incidents immediately along with the name of the Khanal Foods employee who has made such a demand. Failure to do so will also be a violation of the Code of Conduct and sufficient reason to terminate the agreement or contract.
  • Khanal Foods will never retaliate against anyone reporting such incidents where a bribe, in any form, is being demanded.
  • If any employee, or agent, of the supplier/vendor is found to be bribing an employee of Khanal Foods or indulging in any form of corruption, the supplier/vendor will investigate and terminate the services of such an employee or agent. The supplier/vendor will have strong mechanisms to detect and identify such activity proactively and take corrective measures.
  • Khanal Foods strongly discourages its vendor/ suppliers from doing any favours in kind to Khanal Foods employees such as giving gifts, taking them for dinners / junkets etc.

Failure to comply with any of these provisions will result in termination of the agreement or contract and the supplier/vendor being blacklisted.
